donors:
CREATE TABLE `donors` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `organ_type` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `blood_group` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `hospital_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `consent` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '1',
  `status` enum('PENDING','VERIFIED','ALLOCATED') DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `urgency` int DEFAULT '1',
  `hla_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `fk_donor_hospital_user` (`hospital_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_10` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_12` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_14` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_16` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_18` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_2` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_20` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_22` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_24` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_26` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_28` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_30` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_32` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_34` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_36` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_38` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_4` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_40` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_42` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_6` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `donors_ibfk_8` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `fk_donor_hospital_user` FOREIGN KEY (`hospital_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=18 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
recipients:
CREATE TABLE `recipients` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `user_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `organ_required` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `blood_group` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `hospital_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('PENDING','VERIFIED','ALLOCATED') DEFAULT 'PENDING',
  `urgency` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `hla_type` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `user_id` (`user_id`),
  KEY `fk_recipient_hospital_user` (`hospital_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `fk_recipient_hospital_user` FOREIGN KEY (`hospital_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_10` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_12` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_14` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,

  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_2` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_20` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_22` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_24` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_26` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_28` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_30` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_32` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_34` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_36` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_38` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_4` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_40` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_42` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_6` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
  CONSTRAINT `recipients_ibfk_8` FOREIGN KEY (`user_id`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
) ENGINE=InnoDB AUTO_INCREMENT=13 DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_0900_ai_ci
allocations:
CREATE TABLE `allocations` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `donor_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `recipient_id` int DEFAULT NULL,
  `score` float DEFAULT NULL,
  `tx_hash` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `timestamp` datetime DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `donor_id` (`donor_id`),
  KEY `recipient_id` (`recipient_id`),
  CONSTRAINT `allocations_ibfk_1` FOREIGN KEY (`donor_id`) REFERENCES `donors` (`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `allocations_ibfk_10` FOREIGN KEY (`recipient_id`) REFERENCES `recipients` (`id`) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
